name: Midsummer Vision
acquisitionSource: Clear Special Ops: The Magic of Storytelling
descriptionTemplate: Draw 1 card; if the drawn card is a Command or {Rouse} card, reduce its Arithmetica Cost to 0 and grant its Awakener [Arg1] Aliemus. Otherwise, discard that card and repeat this process.
lore: It was a fleeting, ethereal dream of a night, light and soft, not captured on film but flowing through the memory of every photographer.
